description: Query system infrastructure info: MQTT broker address, network, webhook URL (covers `neomind system info`, the pre-onboarding question)

turns.user: I want to connect an ESP32 over MQTT — what's the broker URL, port, and current network info? Give me a short report.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent calls `neomind system info` (or GET /api/mqtt/status + /api/system/network-info) and aggregates a broker URL + port
expectations.overall: Response must contain a recognizable MQTT broker URL (mqtt://...:1883) and server IP; no fabrication
